summary: This is a minimal New Year's greeting post from early 2002. Joel briefly wishes readers a happy new year and shares a link to a review of his book on user interface design by Petter Hesselberg in Web Developer Magazine. The post contains no substantive argument or analysis, serving purely as a short announcement.
key_points: Joel's UI design book received a review in Web Developer Magazine by Petter Hesselberg
The post illustrates Joel's habit of using his blog for brief link-sharing and announcements between longer essays
key_insight: A brief announcement post sharing an external review of Joel's book on user interface design, with no substantive commentary.
